text:

    Merge llvm-project release/18.x llvmorg-18.1.5-0-g617a15a9eac9

    This updates llvm, clang, compiler-rt, libc++, libunwind, lld, lldb and
    openmp to llvm-project release/18.x llvmorg-18.1.5-0-g617a15a9eac9.

    PR:             276104
